title: USFK troop drawdown not staying discussed: Defense Ministry
summary: South Korea and the United States remain not discussing a drawdown of the 28500-strong U.S. forces stationed in Korea, a Ministry of National Defense official said ...
contents:

> South Korea and the United States remain not discussing a drawdown of the 28500-strong U.S. forces stationed in Korea, a Ministry of National Defense official said ...
